headline: Exclusive OOH media owners for V&A Waterfront, Cape Town, South Africa
summary:
South Africa’s biggest OOH providers, Tractor and Reveel, realized that together they could deliver a revolutionary product and service. And the risk paid off. The joint venture, INNOVOCEAN, won exclusive internal, external and digital out-of-home retail advertising rights for the V&A Waterfront 🚀 And I’ve joined this phenomenal team as they continue to revolutionize advertising!

In my spare time, you will find me doing photoshoots, out socializing with family and friends, trail running in the hills, creating something delicious in the kitchen, at the beach, or planning my next adventure! I have lived in 2 countries outside of South Africa and have visited 7 cities so far - My adventurous mind is constantly growing!

My Personality type according to the wonderful Myers-Briggs Personality test, below!

Your Personality Type is: ENFP
Extraverted iNtuitive Feeling Perceiving
You are: Warmly enthusiastic and imaginative. See life as full of possibilities. Make connections between events and information very quickly, and confidently proceed based on the patterns they see. Want a lot of affirmation from others, and readily give appreciation and support. Spontaneous and flexible, often rely on their ability to improvise and their verbal fluency.

I look forward to connecting with you! :)
location_str: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Head of Operations
experiences.description: As the dedicated exclusive OOH media suppliers at the V&A Waterfront, we strategically showcase brands to a diverse audience, creating impactful advertising experiences in this premier destination.
experiences.location: City of Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Sales and Production Co-Ordinator
experiences.description: South Africa’s biggest OOH providers, Tractor and Reveel, realized that together they could deliver a revolutionary product and service. And the risk paid off. The joint venture, INNOVOCEAN, won exclusive internal, external and digital out-of-home retail advertising rights for the V&A Waterfront 🚀
experiences.location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Marketing Coordinator
experiences.description: Once the Covid-19 lockdown hit, I fully engaged in the Marketing of our business to keep our Brand awareness up and to engage with Clients and Candidates while "staying home". I created, edited and orchestrated video content between all 3 regions in SA and ensured that we remained a compassionate brand leveraging us for the first point of call once the economy was back on its feet. I have always loved being in a creative space and my CEO opened up this opportunity for me on return back to the office and placed me in a Marketing Coordinator role. I am a sociable type that loves photography and creating fun out of mundane situations! I always find a silver lining and am usually a jack of all trades type (master of few but I'll give it my best shot hahaha). My Duties include but are not limited to: - Sourcing, capturing and creating images and video used for marketing content - Run and analyse all Social Media platforms - Scheduling media content to the respective channels - Design, plan and implement monthly Social Media posts - Marketing business services by developing and implementing marketing and advertising campaigns. - Track analytics, maintain promotional materials inventory, plan meetings with sales teams, maintain databases, and prepare reports for quarterly meetings with my direct line Manager - Company CEO. - Implement marketing and advertising campaigns by assembling and analyzing business trends; preparing marketing and advertising strategies, plans, and objectives; planning and organizing promotional presentations - Prepare marketing reports by collecting, analyzing, and summarizing Social Media analytics. - Supports sales staff by keeping up with market trends, forecasts and new product information and sharing this with them for conversations had with their clients. Allowing them to upsell on the product offerings.
experiences.location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

experiences.title: Sales Executive/Account Executive - Business Development
experiences.description: Tower Group is an Integrated Business Solutions provider, creating a window for our clients to engage with us on more levels than one under the Tower umbrella. A newly appointed division has been created to accommodate this market, Group Services Division is now running in Durban, Cape Town, and Johannesburg with a representative in each city. Under this division we ensure clients optimize on our solutions offered, allowing them more time to focus on the successful growth of their own desk. In a nutshell, Tower Group is predominantly a recruitment company, however, my role is a Business Development one; Relationships are my strong point and I pride myself on this. I build cohesive relationships with different Area Managers to establish avenues we can assist with and streamline the running of operations with people solutions.

experiences.title: Talent Specialist: Temporary Staffing Division
experiences.description: Sourcing and attracting candidates by using databases, social media, etc. Conducting interviews and filtering candidates for open positions Onboard new employees in order to become fully integrated Monitor and apply HR recruiting best practices Source and recruit candidates by using databases, social media, etc Screen candidates resume and job applications Conduct interviews using various reliable recruiting and selection tools/methods to filter candidates within schedule Act as a point of contact and build influential candidate relationships during the selection proces

experiences.title: Travel Consultant
experiences.description: I managed my own travel desk in the heart of Thailand, sharing my knowledge and love for travel with people alike. Gaining their trust in my know-hows, I was able to sell them trips, flights, accommodation and adventures of a lifetime while living in the most visited city in the world!

experiences.title: Admin and Marketing assistant
experiences.description: I assisted part time with the Admin duties while I was an Au pair for a family of 3 in the second half of my day, In the new year I went on permanently into a marketing role for the company.  I assisted with logo designs and their social media pages while trying to get the online store up and running.

experiences.title: English Second Language Teacher
experiences.description: I taught English in the North and South of Thailand - Learning an incredible amount through wonderful cultures! Culture shock overload :)

experiences.title: Account Executive
experiences.description: Assisted with account management for each mailer that went out daily from the warehouse which was on the same property as the offices were. Assisted with design artwork whilst communicating with clients and production department and constantly ensuring all procedures were on schedule.
